meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Debugging Setup for Students: Master AI Coding
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush debugging blockers. Learn to integrate Antigravity and Claude CLI for professional-grade software development workflows.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, leverage Claude Code’s CLI to perform deep-context codebase analysis. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization, you transform opaque errors into actionable refactoring paths. This setup automates the diagnostic loop, allowing you to focus on building features rather than wrestling with cryptic stack traces.
content.intro:
The blank screen stares back, a silent witness to your stalled momentum. You have the logic, the vision, and the drive, but a persistent bug has anchored your progress to a single line of code. This isn't a failure of skill; it is a failure of your toolset. Most students struggle because they debug linearly, missing the architectural context that AI can instantly synthesize.

We are shifting your workflow from manual hunting to AI-assisted precision. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from being a developer who writes code to an architect who directs intelligent systems. This is the bridge between a student project and a production-ready application.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, authenticated connection between your local environment and Claude Code to enable deep-context project indexing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory architecture and identify potential high-risk coupling points that could lead to runtime errors.

steps.title: Contextual Error Injection
steps.description: Feed specific stack traces into the agent to identify the root cause rather than just the symptom.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the root cause of this stack trace in the context of my current data flow: [INSERT TRACE]
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file=app/core/logic.py --prompt='Analyze the runtime exception in this file'

steps.title: Automated Hypothesis Testing
steps.description: Generate test cases that specifically target the identified failure point to confirm the bug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unit test scenario that triggers the race condition identified in the previous step.

steps.title: Surgical Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using Claude's ability to maintain codebase style consistency and dependency integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor that fixes the bug while maintaining the existing interface signatures.

steps.title: Verification and Cleanup
steps.description: Ensure the fix didn't introduce regressions by running a full-suite automated validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the entire project graph to ensure no ripple effects.

pro_tips: Always use the --verbose flag in Claude Code when debugging complex state machines to see the agent's internal reasoning path.
Map your project structure in Antigravity before starting a session; it forces the AI to respect your architectural boundaries.
When a bug persists, ask Claude to 'play devil's advocate' and find three reasons why the proposed fix might fail in production.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your fixes immediately; this builds your portfolio and reinforces your learning.
If the CLI output feels cluttered, pipe your logs into a text file and ask Claude to summarize the top 3 patterns found in the errors.
content.next_steps: Once your debug loop is optimized, move on to building automated CI/CD pipelines using these same tools to ensure your future code is bug-resistant from the start.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical arsenal to conquer any bug that stands between you and your launch date. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. The industry is waiting for the tools you are about to build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
